subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Kuchik
subcodes.first_line: God willing, Thou art abiding in the shade of God’s mercy, and reposing beneath the canopy of divine bounty. To outward seeming, I am but a child
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در سایه رحمت رحمانی و قباب عنایت سبحانی ساکن و مستریح باشید من کوچکم
subcodes.subjects: @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
